Prop Firm Traders

Why traders keep failing their challenge

Prop firms like FTMO, TopStep, and Apex don't just test your discipline — they test your ability to read the market the way institutions do. Most retail traders fail because they're using indicators built for a different era.

Common reasons challenges fail:

  • ✕Trading against the higher timeframe bias without knowing it
  • ✕Getting stopped out by liquidity sweeps designed to trap retail
  • ✕Entering on repainting signals that look great in hindsight
  • ✕Missing the CISD that signals a genuine institutional reversal
  • ✕Not knowing if price is in premium or discount before entering

How Profit Gang fixes this:

  • ✓Live HTF/MTF bias table tells you the institutional directional bias every bar
  • ✓Liquidity sweep detection marks BSL/SSL so you stop being the stop that gets hunted
  • ✓Zero-repaint signals confirmed on bar close — no illusions
  • ✓CISD auto-detection confirms genuine change in market delivery
  • ✓Live Premium/Discount zones tell you exactly where price sits relative to the range

What's Inside

Every tool a serious trader needs,
automated.

Profit Gang v1.0 took hundreds of hours of ICT/SMC research and compressed it into a single invite-only TradingView indicator. Here's exactly what it does.

🎯
Core Engine
CISD Auto-Detection
Change in State of Delivery is the backbone of ICT methodology — the moment the market proves it has flipped. Profit Gang detects both bullish and bearish CISDs in real time, classifying them as External (reversal), Internal Continuation, or Internal Retracement so you always know the type of move you're trading. No more manual markup.
Zero manual markup required
⚡
Bias Engine
Live HTF/MTF Bias Dashboard
A live on-chart table shows you the Higher Timeframe (HTF) and Mid Timeframe (MTF) directional bias every single bar — CISD bias, swing bias, and open bias. The indicator auto-selects the correct timeframe stack for your chart (15m → 4H/D, 1H → D/W, etc.) so you're always aligned with the institutional flow above you.
Auto timeframe alignment
🔗
Divergence Engine
SMT Divergence Detection
Smart Money Technique divergence is the most powerful reversal signal in ICT — when correlated markets (NQ vs ES, Gold vs Silver, BTC vs ETH) fail to confirm each other's highs or lows. Profit Gang auto-detects this divergence, draws the SMT lines between pivots, and only fires entries when a CISD confirms the reversal, eliminating false positives completely.
Auto-paired correlated symbols
💧
Liquidity Engine
Buy-Side & Sell-Side Liquidity
The indicator automatically maps BSL and SSL levels from every structural pivot (HH, LH, HL, LL) plus your killzone session highs and lows. When price sweeps one of these levels you'll see it in real time. This is how you stop being the stop that gets hit — you become the trader waiting on the other side of the sweep.
Session + structural liquidity
📐
Structure Engine
Auto Swing Labels: HH/HL/LH/LL
Market structure is the foundation. Profit Gang tracks your swing highs and lows in real time, auto-labeling HH, HL, LH, and LL as they form — along with SH (Swing High) and SL (Swing Low) for the macro structure. The algo also tracks internal structure separately so continuation and retracement entries are precisely classified.
Macro + internal structure
🟩
FVG Engine
FVG + iFVG Management
Fair Value Gaps and inverted FVGs (iFVGs) are plotted across your MTF and chart timeframe with automatic mitigation detection. When price inverts a bearish FVG (closing above it), a bullish iFVG box is created — and that iFVG becomes an entry trigger when combined with a CISD on the same bar. This CISD + iFVG combo is the highest-conviction signal the indicator fires.
MTF + LTF FVG tracking
⏰
Session Engine
Killzone Detection
Asia, London, NY AM, NY Lunch, and NY PM killzones are automatically drawn on your chart when you're on sub-15m timeframes. Each killzone's high and low are tracked and registered as liquidity. You can restrict entries to only fire during specific sessions — ideal for prop firm accounts where you need to protect your drawdown during low-probability windows.
5 killzones configurable
📊
Zone Engine
Premium & Discount Zones
Based on the live Fibonacci range between your current swing high and low, the indicator shades the chart with live premium (above 50%) and discount (below 50%) zones, including Fibonacci levels at 0.236, 0.382, 0.5, 0.618, and 0.789. Entries in discount (longs) or premium (shorts) get the highest statistical edge — and you can even require this as a filter for internal entries.
Fibonacci-based PD zones
✅
Execution Engine
Zero-Repaint, Bar-Close Confirmed
Every entry signal — long triangle up or short triangle down — is only plotted after the bar has fully closed and the condition is confirmed. There is no lookahead, no repaint, no retroactive adjustment. What you see on the chart is exactly what would have been tradeable in real time. This is non-negotiable for prop firms where every trade gets scrutinized.
Prop-firm compliant signals
Who It's For

Built for every type of serious trader

🏦
Prop Firm Challengers
Struggling to pass FTMO, TopStep, Apex, or any funded challenge? Profit Gang aligns you with the institutional bias that prop firms trade by. Stop getting trapped by liquidity sweeps and start timing entries at the exact moments institutions enter.
📈
ICT / SMC Learners
Learning ICT concepts manually is overwhelming. CISD, iFVG, SMT, PD zones, killzones — Profit Gang does the markup for you so you can watch the concepts play out live. It's the fastest way to understand how smart money moves because you see it happening in real time.
⚡
Scalpers & Day Traders
Trading NQ, ES, Gold, or Oil on sub-15m charts? The indicator works on every timeframe from 1-minute to weekly. Session killzone boxes, intraday liquidity sweeps, and LTF FVG management give you precision entries on the smallest candles with institutional-level context above.
🌙
Swing Traders
Trading Daily and Weekly structure on NQ, Gold, or forex pairs? The HTF bias dashboard and macro swing structure labels (SH/SL, HH/HL/LH/LL) give you a clear picture of where price is in the larger leg, so you only trade in the direction institutions are positioned.
😤
Consistently Losing Traders
If you've tried every indicator and still can't figure out why price reverses where it does — this is for you. The problem isn't your discipline. It's your framework. Profit Gang gives you the exact institutional model that explains every sweep, every reversal, and every continuation move.
🌍
Multi-Market Traders
One indicator across crypto (BTC, ETH), futures (NQ, ES, Gold, Oil), and forex (EUR/USD, GBP/USD). The SMT auto-pairs your chart to the correct correlated symbol. No need to buy separate tools for each market you trade.
Getting Started

Live on your chart in under 4 minutes

1
Subscribe via Whop
Choose Monthly ($20/wk) or Lifetime. Checkout takes under 60 seconds via Whop's secure payment system.
2

Whop instantly provides your TradingView invite-only script link. No waiting, no manual approval needed.
3
Add to TradingView
Click the link while logged into TradingView, then add "Profit Gang v1.0" from your Invite-Only scripts tab.
4
Start Trading
Drop it on any chart, any market, any timeframe. The indicator auto-configures. You're live instantly.

FAQ

Frequent questions

Profit Gang v1.0 is a TradingView Pine Script v6 indicator (invite-only). You need a TradingView account — a free account works, though a paid TradingView plan allows more indicators on the same chart. After subscribing via Whop, you get an invite link that adds the script instantly.
The indicator does not repaint. Every entry signal (the triangle arrows) is confirmed using barstate.isconfirmed — meaning the signal only plots after the bar has fully closed and the conditions are locked in. There is no lookahead bias. The screenshots on this page show exactly what you'd see in real time.
CISD stands for Change in State of Delivery — an ICT concept that identifies when the market has genuinely shifted from delivering price in one direction to another. It's confirmed when price closes beyond a specific open price of a prior candle during a swing. The indicator classifies CISDs as External (reversals at structural highs/lows), Internal Continuation (same-direction moves within a leg), or Internal Retracement (counter-moves within an ongoing leg). This classification is critical for knowing whether you're entering a reversal, a continuation, or a retracement trade.
There is no free trial for the indicator. However, you can join the free Profit Gang Discord to see real trade calls and community results before committing. Monthly access starts at $20/week and can be cancelled at any time from your Whop account — no minimum period required.
Yes — and this is where traders see the biggest improvement. The indicator's HTF/MTF bias alignment, liquidity sweep detection, and CISD classification directly address the most common reasons traders fail prop challenges: trading against the trend, getting stopped by engineered sweeps, and entering too early or too late. Many members use it specifically for challenge accounts. The no-repaint guarantee also means your backtest results are clean and trustworthy for refining your strategy.
Any market on TradingView — index futures (NQ, ES, MNQ, MES), commodities (Gold MGC/GC, Silver, Crude Oil CL), forex (EUR/USD, GBP/USD, all major pairs), and crypto (BTC, ETH, and more). The SMT divergence feature automatically pairs NQ with ES, Gold with Silver, and BTC with ETH. You can also set a manual compare symbol for any other pair.
Monthly is $20/week (or ~$50/month) and can be cancelled anytime. Lifetime is a single one-time payment that gives you permanent access to Profit Gang v1.0 and all future versions (including v2.0 and beyond), plus the Discord forever. If you're serious about long-term trading, Lifetime pays for itself within a few months and is available at founding-member pricing right now.
Cancel anytime directly from your Whop dashboard with one click. No email required, no questions asked. Your access continues through the end of your paid billing period.
